impacts.statement: Expect near record flooding with major flooding at the confluence of the Little Cypress Creek with the Big Cypress Bayou near Karnack, Texas.
Moderate to severe lowland flooding will continue for several more days.
Lowland flooding will slowly decrease, however, the creek will remain above flood stage for several more days.
Expect minor lowland flooding to continue for several days.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey
Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
